reasoning: Billie Eilish achieved the milestone of having the most monthly listeners on Spotify during parts of 2024 and 2025, generating significant media buzz. However, Spotify's annual 'Top Artist' (as revealed in Spotify Wrapped) is determined by total accumulated streams throughout the year, not peak monthly unique listeners. Artists with huge back catalogs and consistent high-volume listening—such as Taylor Swift, Bad Bunny, The Weeknd, and Drake—dominate this total stream metric. Daily streaming data from early 2025 placed Billie Eilish at approximately #6 globally, trailing behind heavyweights like Bad Bunny and Taylor Swift. Furthermore, Bad Bunny released a new album in 2025, which historically propels him to the #1 annual spot, while Taylor Swift continues to maintain a massive baseline of recurring streams. Given Eilish's smaller overall discography and lower daily total stream volume relative to these top contenders, she is highly unlikely to finish the year as the absolute most streamed artist.
